prompt: Create a luminous stained-glass artwork inside a grand Gothic cathedral, vertical 4:5 composition. The main subject is an anime-style young woman shown from the back and slightly turned in profile, with warm blonde shoulder-length wavy hair made from intricate leaded glass strands. Her face is deliberately covered by a centered opaque beige square privacy block. She wears an off-shoulder pale blue dress with faceted translucent glass panels, exposing her shoulders and upper back. Add a floral hair ornament on the left side of her head with exactly 3 visible flower clusters: pink blossoms, white blossoms, and a green hydrangea-like cluster. The stained-glass window behind her fills nearly the whole frame and is built from many small rectangular and irregular panes in pastel turquoise, aqua, cream, peach, pink, lavender, cobalt blue, and gold, with a decorative arched floral motif at the top. Include exactly 2 side floral elements: a small stained-glass vase with flowers in the lower left of the window, and a real white flower bouquet near the lower right edge. Surround the window with dark carved stone cathedral columns and ribbed arches, with exactly 2 lit candles visible on the left side. Strong sunlight passes through the glass, casting colorful reflections across the polished stone floor and side walls. Emphasize complex transparent glass textures, metallic lead outlines, cracked mosaic facets, glowing highlights, caustic light, ornate cathedral atmosphere, ultra-detailed craftsmanship, romantic fantasy mood, high resolution, no text, no watermark.
